nasb.text: Many women were there looking on from a distance, who had followed Jesus from Galilee while ministering to Him.

esv.text: There were also many women there, looking on from a distance, who had followed Jesus from Galilee, ministering to him,

cnv.text: 有許多婦女在那裡遠遠地觀看；她們是從加利利開始跟隨耶穌服事他的。

ccb.text: 有好些妇女在远处观看，她们从加利利就跟随了耶稣，服侍祂。

csbs.text: 那里有许多妇女从远处观看，她们从加利利开始就跟随耶稣，服事他。
